prompt.content: Can you list the vocab words from the NS- ESL article that I should teach. Also give first 3 steps of the PWIM strategy verbatim for each vocab word.

golden_responses.golden_text_response:
Prohibition
- Show students an image
- Shake out: ask students what objects or actions they see in the image.
-For each object or action they name, draw a line from the image to the word; read the word out loud and spell the word. 

Law
- Show students an image 
- Shake out: ask students what objects or actions they see in the image.
-For each object or action they name, draw a line from the image to the word; read the word out loud and spell the word. 

Alcohol
- Show students an image
- Shake out: ask students what objects or actions they see in the image.
-For each object or action they name, draw a line from the image to the word; read the word out loud and spell the word. 

Government 
- Show students an image
- Shake out: ask students what objects or actions they see in the image.
-For each object or action they name, draw a line from the image to the word; read the word out loud and spell the word. 

Movement
- Show students an image
- Shake out: ask students what objects or actions they see in the image.
-For each object or action they name, draw a line from the image to the word; read the word out loud and spell the word. 

Amendment
- Show students an image 
- Shake out: ask students what objects or actions they see in the image.
-For each object or action they name, draw a line from the image to the word; read the word out loud and spell the word.
